creator: zabiyako@outlook.com
text:
I'm trying to compile FreeBSD port php5, but it won't work. Compilation fails at some point, put php 5.2 port works just fine it was tested under FreeBSD 8 and 9 with same results. Please do not remove old port of php 5.2 as it is the only way to get PHP to work.

Thanks, Denis.

Fix: 

Compile PHP 5.2 port instead of PHP5
How-To-Repeat: try to compile php5 port located at /usr/ports/lang/php5
